document_info.document_type: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet

business_description.nature_of_business: Hotel and hospitality operations, including hotel employees, bellhops/doorpersons, restaurant operations, and clerical office employees.

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number: WC-HCHP-2025-3350; Policy Period: 2025-05-01 to 2026-05-01; Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94.

positives: Claim count decreased from 8 in 2021-2022 to 2 in 2023-2024.
concerns: Loss activity occurred in each of the three listed policy years.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Loss data shown for 2021-2022 through 2023-2024 includes 16 total claims, total paid and incurred losses of 92945, all classified as primary losses with 0 excess losses. By year: 2023-2024 had 2 claims and 9940 incurred; 2022-2023 had 6 claims and 26662 incurred; 2021-2022 had 8 claims and 56343 incurred.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Payroll / classification data includes TX class codes 9052 Hotel — All Other Employees, 9060 Hotel — Bellhops, Doorpersons, 9082 Restaurant — NOC, and 8810 Clerical Office Employees — NOC.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Actual loss data: 2023-2024: 2 claims, 9940 total paid, 9940 total incurred, 9940 primary losses, 0 excess losses. 2022-2023: 6 claims, 26662 total paid, 26662 total incurred, 26662 primary losses, 0 excess losses. 2021-2022: 8 claims, 56343 total paid, 56343 total incurred, 56343 primary losses, 0 excess losses.
